title: betonica officinalis var. velebitica
intro: Betonica officinalis var. velebitica, also known as Velebit betony, is a subspecies of the Betonica officinalis plant, native to the mountainous regions of the Adriatic coast. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Velebit betony include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as soothing digestive issues, and it has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever and bronchitis. Velebit betony can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
